about.title: Backend Developer | Node.js, Express, Golang & gRPC | Living in Seoul, South Korea
about.p1: Hi, I’m Eddy Joss Axel Mouity Etavenot. I’m a backend developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable and high-performance systems.
about.p2: I started my journey in 2019 with PHP, and over time I specialized in JavaScript and TypeScript, working mainly with Node.js and Express to design REST APIs and backend services. More recently, I’ve been focusing on Golang to build concurrent systems, microservices, and gRPC-based architectures.
about.p3: I focus on building reliable, production-ready backend systems, with a strong emphasis on performance and system design. Currently, I’m looking to contribute to a team where I can continue growing my skills in distributed systems and backend architecture.
